name: My boss is mad I filed after ladder fall, is retaliation legal?
description: Illegal—report to state labor dept, lawyer protects you.

mainEntity.name: My boss is mad I filed after ladder fall, is retaliation legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal—report to state labor dept, lawyer protects you.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation is illegal** under Utah/Idaho law—protected activity.[6]

Can't fire/demote for claiming comp.

- Document threats/changes.
- File OSHA/EEOC charge if occurs.

Damages include job reinstatement, backpay.

Lawyers handle retaliation suits too.
